channel.title: chocolate on TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !
channel.description: Recent content in chocolate on TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Achievements More than 80% of our students are first-generation engineers of their families. We positioned a candidate for a startup that happily accepted 6 consecutive students. Today techatpark is run by our own eX-students.

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: The idea of TECH@PARK was not born in any boardroom discussions. We are not backed by any funding houses. We are a group of like-minded techies who commit our time and effort to give back to the society for a larger social cause. We do not have classrooms or paid instructors. But still, we have made a difference in the quality of talents we produce. Our results are different because our method itself is different.

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Our Values Chosen We handpick our students. If one gets into us, it means he/she deserves 'IT'! Up to Date Professionally Trained by experts from industry. Our syllabus is always evolving with current market needs/trends.. No waiting time Our students are technically productive from day 1

item.title: Post No. 1
item.description: Schoolership We have been in the process of building great teams for little more that a decade. If you are looking to build development team from the scratch and also help us to place our candidates below is how we shall justify-content-center Rent a Team from us (4 Enginmeers-1 Volunteer) We provide training on the technogies Hire the team (once you and the trainee are in mutuall agrement)
